description: In this episode of the Hive Mind podcast, hosts discuss the recent Eigen layer airdrop and the controversies surrounding it, including VPN blocking and non-transferability of tokens. They analyze the implications for retail investors and the overall market dynamics.
topic_summary: The episode covers the Eigen layer airdrop and the associated issues that have sparked debate among the crypto community, particularly focusing on the non-transferability of tokens and the impact of VPN requirements on user experience [t=66:69].
